common.configureApiKey: ⚠️ Please configure your API Key in Settings first

settings.title: Settings
settings.providerDesc: The selected provider will be used during lessons. Make sure its API Key is configured.
settings.modelDesc: Leave empty to use the default recommended model for each provider.
settings.apiKeySaved: ✓ {{provider}} API Key saved (stored in macOS Keychain)
settings.apiKeyStorage: Keys are securely stored in macOS Keychain
settings.githubWaitingBrowser: GitHub authorization page opened in browser. Please complete login and return here...
settings.githubClientIdRequired: Please enter a GitHub OAuth Client ID first
settings.githubClientIdPlaceholder: Enter your GitHub OAuth App Client ID
settings.githubClientIdHint: Go to github.com/settings/developers to create an OAuth App. Set Callback URL to http://localhost
settings.layoutCardsDesc: Hand-drawn style with classic serif typography

landing.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete workspace '{{name}}'? This action cannot be undone.
landing.subtitle: Learning is no longer lonely.
landing.reviewModeDesc: Launch immersive tutoring protocol, quick drills...
landing.lessonModeCardDesc: Socratic learning + light novel narration — AI companions that feel truly human.
landing.reviewModeCardDesc: Immersive tutoring protocol — drill problems while reading a light novel, independent from study mode.

setup.welcomeDesc: Immersive AI Socratic teaching — let three light novel characters become your physics tutors.
setup.welcomeHint: Just a few simple steps ahead, and you'll be ready to start learning.
setup.selectProviderDesc: SocraticNovel needs an AI API Key to power its teaching. We recommend Anthropic (Claude).
setup.apiKeySecure: Your API Key will be securely stored in macOS Keychain and never sent to any third-party server.
setup.selectContentDesc: Choose the teaching system you want to experience.
setup.builtinDesc: Complete built-in teaching system — three tutors, Socratic method, light novel narration
setup.createFromScratchDesc: Use Meta Prompt AI to guide the creation of a custom teaching system
setup.importWorkspaceDesc: Import an existing SocraticNovel workspace from a folder (coming soon)
setup.setupCompleteDesc: All set. Click the button below to begin your Socratic learning journey.

practice.animaTutorDesc: Choose your favorite character and subject, AI auto-generates an exclusive immersive tutoring protocol
practice.animaTutorInit: Takes a few minutes to initialize
practice.yuukiDesc: Pre-built immersive companion protocol — a seventeen-year-old professional death game player, teaching through scene-based learning in the Aurora Corridor
practice.yuukiProgress: Where are you in the story so far?
practice.whoTutors: 🎭 Who would you like as your tutor?
practice.fillCharInfo: Fill in character info, or select a preset character
practice.introPlaceholder: Describe the character's personality, speaking style, and how they interact with students...
practice.whatToLearn: 📚 What do you want to learn?
practice.subjectPlaceholder: e.g. AP Physics C: E&M, Calculus, Java Programming
practice.extraPlaceholder: e.g. Focus on electromagnetic induction, answer in Chinese...
practice.generatingProtocol: AnimaTutor is generating your personalized tutoring protocol…
practice.generatingWait: This may take a minute or two, please wait
practice.usage2: • AI guides your thinking with questions
practice.usage3: • You can follow up or send new problems
practice.yuukiLoaded: 👻 Yuuki Alpha protocol loaded — send me your problems!

lesson.clickToStart: Click "Start Class" in the top right to enter the classroom

notes.title: 📝 Study Notes
notes.generateDesc: Generate review notes for this lesson
notes.generateHint: AI will analyze the conversation to extract core concepts, formulas, solution methods, and common mistakes
notes.generatingNotes: Analyzing conversation and generating notes… (about 15-30 seconds)
notes.notesTitle: AP Physics C: E&M — Study Notes
notes.ankiHint: Click "Generate Anki Cards" to create flashcards from this lesson
notes.ankiConnectError: Cannot connect to AnkiConnect. Please make sure Anki is open and the AnkiConnect plugin is installed.
notes.configApiKeyFirst: Please configure your API Key in Settings first

review.title: 🧠 Spaced Review
review.reviewDoneHint: Add new cards or wait for the next review

progress.title: 📊 Learning Progress
progress.noRecords: No class records yet. After your first lesson, the Post-Lesson Agent will automatically update progress data.

metaPrompt.createDesc: Design your immersive teaching system with a questionnaire, AI auto-generates all files
metaPrompt.workspaceExists: Workspace "{{name}}" already exists, please choose a different name
metaPrompt.workspaceCreated: ✅ Workspace created, initializing AI generation engine...
metaPrompt.aiEngineReady: 🤖 AI generation engine ready — sending your design decisions...
metaPrompt.conflictError: Workspace name conflict, please go back and change the name

wizard.noMaterialWarningDesc: You haven't uploaded any course outlines or textbook PDFs, and haven't filled in the topic overview. Without teaching content, AI cannot teach effectively. We recommend uploading materials first.

stepSubject.title: 📋 Basic Information
stepSubject.desc: Tell us what you want to learn
stepSubject.subjectPlaceholder: e.g. AP Physics C: E&M, Linear Algebra, JLPT N2
stepSubject.topicOverviewPlaceholder: Briefly describe the main topics covered in the course...
stepSubject.charCount1Desc: One tutor teaches all lessons, focused narrative
stepSubject.uploadMaterialsDesc: Upload course PDFs (textbooks, syllabi, handouts). The system will auto-extract text for teaching.
stepSubject.garbledWarningDesc: The following files use anti-copy font encoding. Text extraction may produce garbled content:
stepSubject.garbledWarningHint: 💡 Go to "Import PDF" page and use Vision OCR mode to re-import these files. AI will read the rendered images to correctly extract content.
stepSubject.garbledWarningHintVision: 💡 Click the button next to each file to use free Apple Vision OCR, or go to "Import PDF" page for higher quality AI Vision results (with LaTeX formulas).

stepCharacters.title: 🎭 Character Creation
stepCharacters.customNameHint: Enter any character name you like, AI will auto-fill the character settings
stepCharacters.customNamePlaceholder: e.g. Oreki Hotaro, Harry Potter, Sun Wukong...
stepCharacters.customNameSelected:
✅ Selected character "{{name}}" — AI will auto-fill detailed settings during generation.
You can also manually adjust below.
stepCharacters.appearancePlaceholder: e.g. brown hair, drowsy eyes, blazer draped over shoulder
stepCharacters.personalityPlaceholder: Describe the character's core personality traits...
stepCharacters.backstoryAutoPlaceholder: AI will design backstory based on the character's personality...
stepCharacters.backstoryManualPlaceholder: Describe fragments of the character's past, no need for a complete story...

stepWorld.title: 🌍 World Building
stepWorld.desc: Design the space and relationships where the story takes place
stepWorld.locationQuestion: Where does the story take place?
stepWorld.locationHint: Not an "online classroom" — a place where you can smell the air and hear sounds
stepWorld.enclosedExamples: Mountaintop observatory, coastal lighthouse, renovated old mansion
stepWorld.semiOpenExamples: Forest cabin cluster, rooftop terrace, island research station
stepWorld.everydayExamples: Shared apartment, house near university, countryside old house
stepWorld.locationPlaceholder:
Describe the specific location: what sub-spaces are there? Climate? Lighting?
A good location has at least 3 sub-spaces (study area, living area, private area) + one shared space
stepWorld.arrivalQuestion: Why did the learner come here?
stepWorld.arrangedDesc: Parents enrolled, school assigned → initially distant
stepWorld.selfSoughtDesc: Word of mouth, recommendation, actively sought → medium distance
stepWorld.accidentalDesc: Moving, transfer, chance discovery → uncertain distance
stepWorld.arrivalReasonPlaceholder: Briefly describe why the learner came to this place
stepWorld.characterRelationsHint: They're not just "colleagues" — they have a history. Who arrived first? Any tension or rapport?
stepWorld.characterRelationsPlaceholder:
Describe the relationships and history between characters...
No need for a complete story — a few key details are enough
stepWorld.supernaturalHint: Belongs to at most one character. Scarcity creates weight. Supernatural elements should make the character more vulnerable, not more powerful
stepWorld.supernaturalPlaceholder:
Describe supernatural settings...
Reference types: Perception (can see something) / Memory / Spatial

stepStory.title: 📖 Story Design
stepStory.desc: Design the emotional arc of the learning experience
stepStory.roundRobinDesc: A → B → C → A → B → C...
stepStory.keyEventsHint: Only skeleton events needed (3-5 most important), AI will fill in the rest during generation
stepStory.keyEventsPlaceholder:
Describe events that must happen...
e.g. Ch.10 a character reveals their past for the first time, Ch.20 group chat name changes

stepReview.title: ✅ Review Summary
stepReview.desc: Please review the design below, then click "Start Generating" to confirm
stepReview.subject: Subject

chatInput.placeholderEnabled: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
chatInput.disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Verify important information.

canvas.emptyTitle: AI will display diagrams and formulas here

agentLog.empty: Agent activity logs will appear here

pdfImport.title: 📄 PDF Textbook Import
pdfImport.importDesc: Select a PDF file to auto-extract text and convert to Markdown in the workspace
pdfImport.noTextContent: No text content on this page
pdfImport.configApiKey: Please configure your API Key in Settings first

history.title: Session History
history.emptyHint: After finishing a lesson, conversations and canvas content will be saved here automatically.
history.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this session record? This cannot be undone.
history.readOnlyHint: This is a read-only review of a past session
history.noCanvas: No canvas content in this session
history.noGroupChat: No group chat in this session
